stemHtml: Globe Air 261 is en route from Dubai to London Gatwick and contacts Maastricht for descent clearance. Which response uses correct radiotelephony pronunciation?

options.a: Globe Air TOO SIX WUN, cleared to descend flight level TOO FOW-er FIFE.
options.b: TWO SIXER WUN, cleared to descend flight level WUN AIT.
options.c: Globe Air TWO SIX WUN, cleared to descend and maintain flight level TOO FOW-er FIFE.
options.d: TWO SIXER WUN, cleared to descend flight level WUN HUN-dred AITY.
